comment: 16yo whose father has confirmed FAP (APC pathogenic variant, >100 colorectal adenomas, treated with prophylactic colectomy age 22). Patient untested, asymptomatic. Engine routes to PreventionPlan: standard = pre-test counseling + germline APC panel (incl. MUTYH for MAP differential); alternative = empirical sigmoidoscopy from age 10-12. Validates v0.2-B FAP hereditary pilot.
